name: Artifact or source-schema explanation
prediction: The apparent signal disappears after source parsing changes, shuffle controls, or target substitution.
weakenedBy: signal direction survives holdout and replay while control collapses

name: Simple baseline sufficiency explanation
prediction: A median, linear, or row-count baseline explains the observation without a new descriptor.
weakenedBy: candidate descriptor adds stable residual separation beyond baseline
